summary: P1 Features Testing Complete: Hobbyist Funnel & Ad-Free Toggle Logic. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified - Photographer Subscription page shows 'Start Free as Hobbyist' button, HobbyistFunnel displays Free ($0) and Basic ($5) plans with correct ad-supported/ad-free labels.

minor.issue: Fixed: Was using STRIPE_SECRET_KEY instead of STRIPE_API_KEY env variable

critical_code_review_comments: auth.py convert_to_hobbyist endpoint correctly converts Photographer to Hobbyist with tier_1 (free) returning role=Hobbyist, is_ad_supported=true
auth.py convert_to_hobbyist endpoint correctly returns Stripe checkout_url for tier_2 (basic $5)
subscriptions.py pay-with-credits endpoint correctly sets is_ad_supported=false for paid tiers (price > $0) and is_ad_supported=true for free tiers
Login response (ProfileResponse) correctly includes is_ad_supported field
HobbyistFunnel.js correctly displays Free ($0) and Basic ($5) plans with ad-supported/ad-free labels
PhotographerSubscription.js correctly shows 'Start Free as Hobbyist' button that opens HobbyistFunnel
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account and created test users dynamically
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Hobbyist Funnel and Ad-Free Toggle features fully tested. Key files: /app/backend/routes/auth.py (convert-to-hobbyist endpoint), /app/backend/routes/subscriptions.py (pay-with-credits with is_ad_supported logic), /app/frontend/src/components/HobbyistFunnel.js (Hobbyist plan selection UI), /app/frontend/src/components/PhotographerSubscription.js (shows 'Start Free as Hobbyist' button). Ad-free toggle logic: price > $0 sets is_ad_supported=false, price = $0 sets is_ad_supported=true.

POST_auth_convert_to_hobbyist_basic_tier.details: Returns success=true with Stripe checkout_url for $5 payment

POST_subscriptions_pay_with_credits_paid.details: Returns insufficient_credits error when balance < required credits

login_includes_is_ad_supported.details: Login response includes is_ad_supported boolean field

photographer_subscription_hobbyist_butto.details: 'Start Free as Hobbyist' button visible on Photographer Subscription page

hobbyist_funnel_free_plan.details: Free ($0/forever) plan displayed with 'Ad-supported experience' label

hobbyist_funnel_basic_plan.details: Basic ($5/month) plan displayed with 'Ad-free experience' label

hobbyist_funnel_gear_credits.details: 'Gear Credits' and 'Support Groms & Causes' text displayed

mocked_apis.note: Stripe checkout is in test mode (sk_test_*) - returns real checkout URLs
